name: Hot Tub
description:
The moon has turned a translucent silver and casts a light that
illuminates the outlines of the bodies in the hot tub. This is the place
to relax and get to know the one sitting across from you. The hot tub is
cozy, almost magical as the pulsing jet stream of water makes direct
contact in your most secret places and those strong, smooth bubbles
massage reality away. Soft music, with a steady beat fills the air,
touches your soul and strikes an almost primal urge in you. You drift in a
secure and sensual place as your body responds to the steamy water, the
feather-light touches of someone and you enter a dreamlike state.
